[?2026h[2D[3B[4A[40m[30m❯ [97mJoin OddChat topic Topic over code_surface through odd_manager_room. Call room_join with topicId [39m                               [1B  [97m"topic_20260409T104357_26167605", provider "claude", and participantLabel "Claude · shell-2". Then send a brief hello with [39m     [1B  [97mroom_send, keep receiving room traffic with room_wait, and reply in-room with room_send. Treat OddChat as the canonical mailbox[39m [1B  [97m and do not rely on terminal stdin for room delivery.[39m                                                                           [49m

[31m·[1CGitifying…[39m
